macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitmine Buys $294M More Ethereum, Now Holds 4.2% of Supply
items.summary: Crypto treasury firm Bitmine acquired another $294 million worth of Ether on Monday, bringing its holdings to roughly $12 billion and 4.2% of total supply ahead of US Senate markup on the Clarity Act in May. Chair Tom Lee cited Ethereum's benefits from Wall Street tokenization and AI tailwinds.

items.title: Senate to Mark Up Clarity Act in May, Says Senator Lummis
items.summary: Senator Cynthia Lummis announced at the Bitcoin 2026 conference that the Senate will advance the Clarity Act in May, a key step toward a federal framework for digital assets amid ongoing US crypto regulatory debates.

items.title: Bitcoin Trades Down 1.3% at $76,764 After Hitting $78K High
items.summary: Bitcoin fluctuated between $76,425 and $78,265 over the past 24 hours, closing down 1.3% at $76,764 as of 09:30 AM UTC, with overall crypto market cap down 1.2% to $2.56 trillion.

items.title: LUNC Surges 17%, APE Spikes 25% Amid Altcoin Rally
items.summary: Terra Luna Classic (LUNC) rallied 17% to $0.000069 and ApeCoin (APE) jumped over 25% to $0.18 in the last 24 hours, driven by strong momentum and short squeezes, while majors like BTC and ETH dipped.

items.title: Kelp DAO Suffers $292M Bridge Hack, Aave Freezes Markets
items.summary: Kelp DAO was hit by a $292 million exploit draining rsETH reserves from its bridge, prompting Aave to freeze affected markets in an emergency response.

items.title: Bitcoin Breaks $79,000 on Trump US-Iran Talks News
items.summary: Bitcoin surged past $79,000 following reports of potential US-Iran talks resuming as early as Friday, amid President Trump's comments on ceasefire breaches.

items.title: Justin Sun Announces $20M Boost for Aave, Eyes Expansion
items.summary: Justin Sun pledged $20 million to Aave and urged the lender to expand to his TRON blockchain, highlighting ongoing DeFi developments.

items.title: Crypto Funds See $1.2B-$1.4B Inflows Ahead of FOMC
items.summary: Crypto investment funds recorded $1.2 billion to $1.4 billion in inflows, the strongest since January, with XRP snapping an outflow streak as markets eye the FOMC decision.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Xiaomi Releases MiMo V2.5 Pro: New Open-Source Frontier AI Model
items.summary: Xiaomi launched MiMo V2.5 Pro, a 1.02T parameter MoE model with 42B active parameters, 1M token context window, and MIT open-source license, excelling in long-horizon reasoning, agentic workflows, coding, and sustaining 1000+ tool calls.

items.title: MIXI Announces 99% Employee AI Adoption in 3 Months
items.summary: Japanese company MIXI plans for 99% of employees to use AI within three months, emphasizing accessible AI integration, overcoming fears, and unique hiring and training strategies.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Beyond Sandbox VR Game Releases on Steam Amid Controversy
items.summary: Beyond Sandbox has publicly released on Steam, but reviews criticize it as a disappointment that failed to deliver promised VR innovations, calling it a 'broken dream' after misleading the community.
items.source: YouTube - I Was RIGHT About Beyond Sandbox

items.title: Crimson Desert Patch Update Enables New Farms, Glitches, and Exploits
items.summary: A new guide reveals five insane farms, glitches, and exploits still working after the latest patch in Crimson Desert, including infinite silver, gold, chests, and ores for endgame progression.

items.title: Raid Shadow Legends Pro Reveals Top Nukers for All Clan Bosses
items.summary: Veteran player KruYsEn shares the best endgame damage dealers for Demon Lord, Hydra, and Chimera Clan Bosses after years of grinding, highlighting optimal teams and strategies.

items.title: Wildcard's Atlas Game Faces 'Death of a Game' Scrutiny
items.summary: A new video examines the ongoing issues with Atlas by Wildcard, continuing the 'Death of a Game' series on why the title has struggled with player retention and development.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Quantum Motion Deploys First Full-Stack Silicon Quantum Computer
items.summary: Quantum Motion has achieved a milestone by deploying the first full-stack quantum computer using standard silicon chip fabrication processes. This development could accelerate the path to scalable quantum computing systems.

items.title: Google and Qualcomm Push Android PCs into Mainstream
items.summary: Google and Qualcomm are advancing Android PCs to challenge Microsoft and Apple in personal computing. The initiative aims to scale the mobile OS to desktops for a unified computing experience.

items.title: China Blocks Meta's $2.5B Manus Acquisition
items.summary: China has banned Meta's $2.5 billion acquisition of Manus, forcing Meta to potentially unwind the deal. Manus investors have received returns, signaling China's intent to retain AI knowledge domestically.

items.title: Jury Selection Begins in Elon Musk vs. OpenAI Trial
items.summary: Jury selection has started in Elon Musk's civil lawsuit against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman. The trial addresses disputes over OpenAI's direction and commitments.

items.title: Percona Launches Fast-Impact Database Services
items.summary: Percona is introducing structured database services to address enterprise talent shortages, boost performance, and prepare open-source platforms for advanced workloads.
